description: Approved model identity and the CI variables it implies. The model-manifest job imports the variables map as a dotenv report so downstream jobs inherit them (dotenv overrides the inline defaults in .gitlab-ci.yml but is itself overridable by Project/manual CI variables). The live fixture is verified against model.sha256 by model-fixture-download. This file is the single source of truth for the approved model — change it (and re-run) to roll the model forward.
